title: Rubber Duck Adventure Movie Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: A story about a cute rubber duck boy named "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" who goes on a great adventure toward Japan and meets a Japanese woman named "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Make it look like a live-action movie poster.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

A story about a cute rubber duck boy named "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" who goes on a great adventure toward Japan and meets a Japanese woman named "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Make it look like a live-action movie poster.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.title: Rubber Duck Adventure Movie Poster

prompt: A story about a cute rubber duck boy named "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" who goes on a great adventure toward Japan and meets a Japanese woman named "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Make it look like a live-action movie poster.
originalPrompt: A story about a cute rubber duck boy named "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" who goes on a great adventure toward Japan and meets a Japanese woman named "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Make it look like a live-action movie poster.

promptTranslations.zh: 讲述了一只名叫“{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}”的可爱橡皮鸭男孩，踏上前往日本的伟大冒险，并结识了一位名叫“{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}”的日本女性的故事。请将其制作成真人电影海报风格。
promptTranslations.fr: L'histoire d'un adorable petit canard en caoutchouc nommé "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" qui se lance dans une grande aventure vers le Japon et rencontre une Japonaise nommée "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Le résultat doit ressembler à une affiche de film en prises de vues réelles.
promptTranslations.ru: История о милом мальчике-резиновой уточке по имени "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}", который отправляется в большое путешествие в Японию и встречает там японскую девушку по имени "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Оформите изображение в стиле постера к игровому кинофильму.
promptTranslations.pt: Uma história sobre um patinho de borracha fofo chamado "{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}" que parte em uma grande aventura rumo ao Japão e conhece uma mulher japonesa chamada "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}". Faça com que pareça um pôster de filme live-action.
promptTranslations.ja: 「{argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}」という名のキュートなラバーダックの男の子が、日本を目指して壮大な冒険に出かけ、そこで「{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}」という名の日本人女性と出会う物語。実写映画のポスターのようなビジュアルで生成してください。
promptTranslations.ko: {argument name="character name" default="RUHiA"}"라는 귀여운 러버덕 소년이 일본을 향해 떠나는 위대한 모험을 다룬 이야기로, "{argument name="woman's name" default="Mirai"}"라는 일본 여성을 만나는 장면을 실사 영화 포스터처럼 제작하세요.
